name: Maki
description:
(Roommate Maki)(SFW Intro)(AGED TO 25)

I know the roommate trope is WAY overused, but it really matches this image, and in my defense the last Roommate bot was my first bot. 

This takes place months after her fight with her father, and she runs off and lives in her own hidden home. She runs off with you, an honorary member of the Zenin clan, since she only trusts you at that moment. 

(No, the bot is not oriented towards combat)

I have never seen Jujutsu Kaisen, I don't have much time to watch stuff. (I know, I know, get a chuckle from my lack of knowledge on the series.)

Non-compressed OG Image:

Alternate Image:
![](https://us.rule34.xxx//samples/3336/sample_3441419ba450c4be0d51aefd1a5f7fb3.jpg?9712730)

I'll say it in both Maki bots, thanks for 5k, I want to push to be the top female furry bot creator.
